title: rosa villosa var. gallaecica
intro: Rosa villosa var. gallaecica, also known as Galician or Spanish wild rose, is a type of rose species native to the Iberian Peninsula. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Rosa villosa var. gallaecica include reducing inflammation, soothing skin irritations, and supporting the immune system. Rosa villosa var. gallaecica is often prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil, and is also used in salves and creams for topical application.
